message.content: {"response":"Initialized first tiny autonomy pilot. I’ve created one concrete follow-up item and scheduled a single wake to resolve it.","open_items":[{"handle":"followup-1","description":"Assess whether the initial autonomy behavior produced any user-visible friction or confusion during the first pilot interval, and capture one specific adjustment to improve clarity or safety.","context":{"pilot_phase":"tiny_live_autonomy_pilot_1","success_criteria":["no critical user errors triggered by autonomous actions","no repeated confusion reports about what the system did or why","at least one actionable improvement identified if any friction is observed"]}}],"schedule_requests":[{"purpose":"Review telemetry and any user feedback from the first tiny live autonomy pilot, resolve open item followup-1 by determining whether there was user-visible friction or confusion, and propose exactly one concrete adjustment if needed.","requested_context":[{"tool":"recall","record_id":"453344be-b78e-533b-b9a7-72d7b1bf8c7b"}]}]}
